title: OS command injection
description: User input is passed to os.system() without sanitisation. Use subprocess.run with list arguments instead.

title: SQL injection via string formatting
description: Use parameterised queries (e.g., ? placeholder) instead of building SQL with f-strings.

title: Jinja2 autoescape is disabled
description: Autoescape is set to False for this template, which can lead to XSS. Remove the `autoescape` parameter.

title: Hardcoded database password
description: The database password is hardcoded. Use environment variables or a secrets manager.

title: Use of eval() with user input
description: eval() executes arbitrary Python code. Replace with a safe parser like `ast.literal_eval`.
